headline: T. Rowe Price (TROW) Picks Mike Barry To Lead Global Marketing And AI Push
summary: T. Rowe Price Group (NasdaqGS:TROW) has appointed Mike Barry as head of Global Marketing. Barry is set to lead AI enabled digital marketing, global branding and thought leadership across client channels. The move highlights a push to deepen client engagement in retail, wealth, retirement and institutional markets. T. Rowe Price Group, trading at $107.65, has seen mixed recent performance, with the stock down 1.8% over the past week but up 5.6% over the past month. Over longer horizons,...

headline: T. Rowe Price (TROW) Stock After 5-Year Slump And Recent 1-Year Rebound
summary: If you are wondering whether T. Rowe Price Group at around US$107.65 offers good value today, the key is understanding how its current share price stacks up against different valuation measures. The stock has been relatively steady in the short term, with the share price falling 1.8% over the last week but rising 5.6% over the last month, and it has returned 21.5% over the past year despite a 31.9% decline over five years.
